title: Carpodetes recurvata
taxonomy: Carpodetes recurvata is classified as a species of plant in the genus Carpodetes within the family Sapindaceae. The Sapindaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the soapberry family. Carpodetes recurvata is a type of plant native to Southeast Asia. It belongs to the order Sapindales and the clade rosids. The specific classification of Carpodetes recurvata is subject to ongoing research and may be refined as new information becomes available.
